title: pentapogon suizanensis
intro: Pentapogon suizanensis, also known as Japanese beach paspalis, is a species of grass-like plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Pentapogon suizanensis include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as an infusion or made into a tincture for its medicinal properties.
